headline: HRS 2026: Medtronic, Boston Scientific and Abbott debut key PFA data
summary: New data on the pulsed-field ablation (PFA) device class debuts at HRS 2026 as the field catches the eye of several large medtech companies.

raw.headline: HRS 2026: Medtronic, Boston Scientific and Abbott debut key PFA data
raw.summary: New data on the pulsed-field ablation (PFA) device class debuts at HRS 2026 as the field catches the eye of several large medtech companies.

headline: 1 Healthcare Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. But speed bumps such as inventory destockings have persisted in the wake of COVID-19, limiting growth. This has capped the upside for healthcare stocks lately as the industry’s flat return over the past six months has trailed the S&P 500’s 4.2% gain.

headline: Medtronic: Expectations Are Low And That's The Opportunity
summary: Medtronic is rated a Buy, seeing limited downside and gradual upside from consistent execution and incremental margin gains. Read more on MDT stock here.

headline: 4 studies to know from HRS 2026
summary: Boston Scientific, Abbott and Medtronic shared new cardiac device data at the annual Heart Rhythm Society meeting, where market share shifts in pulsed field ablation were on analysts’ minds.

headline: J&J to acquire Atraverse Medical
summary: The FDA-cleared radiofrequency guidewire will slot into J&J’s fast-growing cardiovascular portfolio.
